name: Cerulean
description:
Sorry guys I starved you of a bot for so long. I had testing and school!

Anyways, FORSAKEN BOT!!!!

(If the bot talks for you it isn’t my fault.)

"Hey, new one. Look over here."

Art by @h0shi1_q on Twitter!(Or X.)

Just gonna say this but if you have advertising, threats(real or not), not any advice or problem(if you leave a dislike) then it will be removed from the comments.

UPDATE ONE: I have slightly changed the bot a bit. Don’t worry, it’s still the same mostly just for one new things. For example, a head cannon, some new lore, the specters presences yada yada. Including a brand new introduction.(P.S if there are any bot makers in my comments, please tell me how to fix an issue with when someone try’s to talk and enhance their message, it’s just the characters response if they were to send it. I got this comment and had deleted it until I can fix it. Thank you!)

[UPDATE TWO: As of now recently, I have heard the drama from Ava and Soul. Hate the creator, not the creation. She isn’t getting scrapped! I will make another Wanwood bot instead tho.]

[No, I will not be turning on proxy. Don’t ask.]
creator: 523CrazyDud
